_meta.causal_validation: Causal logic is questionable/unestablished — turnover mechanics are operational not economic. α1 diagnostic (Task 70) showed 89.8% full-refresh + 100% time_stop sells; α1.1 tests whether rank-buffer + budget=1 mechanism reduces churn without destroying α1's positive same-gross α point estimate. The underlying inverse-momentum thesis is inherited from α1 and is itself unestablished — IC pattern, not economic mechanism.
_meta.numbers_validation: Specific numbers reported AS-RUN; no curve-fit. v3 §2 hard gates evaluated separately via scripts/v3_gate_eval.py. α1.1 mechanics gates (turnover ≤ 3.0, untouched > 2.0, full_refresh < 0.30, same_day_rebuy = 0) are evaluated in the runner report — they are NOT enforced by v3_gate_eval.
